title: Technology Validation

experiments.name: Vision Feasibility
experiments.summary: SAM-Road++ loads successfully on CPU. ViT-B backbone (357 MB) downloaded from HuggingFace. Trained checkpoint (spacenet_vitb_256_e10.ckpt) loads as valid PyTorch state_dict. Model architecture parseable. Sample image (1024×1024) loaded.

experiments.name: Graph Pipeline Feasibility
experiments.summary: Core concept (mask → skeleton → graph → NetworkX algorithms) validated end-to-end. 236 nodes, 97 edges detected from synthetic road mask. Betweenness centrality computed. sknw blocked by numba/llvmlite build failure (system LLVM issue on macOS); pure-Python fallback produced fragmented topology (139 components, largest=2 nodes). No fundamental architectural flaw.

experiments.name: Dashboard Feasibility
experiments.summary: Streamlit 1.59.1 and PyDeck 0.9.3 import correctly. GeoJSON FeatureCollection built from synthetic road graph (20 nodes, 31 edges). GeoJsonLayer + ScatterplotLayer created successfully. pdk.Deck renders. Full dashboard app written to validation/dashboard/dashboard_app.py.

experiments.name: Technology Compatibility
experiments.summary: 20/20 runtime dependencies import successfully (numpy 2.4.6, scipy 1.17.1, pandas 3.0.3, rasterio 1.4.4, geopandas 1.1.4, shapely 2.1.2, pyproj 3.7.2, networkx 3.6.1, scikit-image 0.26.0, scikit-learn 1.9.0, torch 2.2.2, torchvision 0.17.2, opencv 5.0.0, omegaconf 2.3.1, pyyaml 6.0.3, loguru 0.7.3, streamlit 1.59.1, pydeck 0.9.3, folium 0.20.0, typer 0.26.8). Pickle and GeoJSON serialization work; GraphML fails with MultiDiGraph (known NetworkX 3.x limitation).

risks.impact: sknw blocked on macOS; impacts graph extraction from skeleton
risks.mitigation: Evaluate alternative skeleton-to-graph packages (skeleton2graph, custom impl) or fix llvmlite build (Homebrew LLVM, conda-forge)

risks.impact: torch emits UserWarning about _ARRAY_API; potential instability in edge cases
risks.mitigation: Pin numpy<2 in production requirements, or upgrade torch to 2.3+

risks.impact: Cannot use GraphML as interop format unless converting to plain Graph first
risks.mitigation: Use Pickle for full round-trips, convert to Graph for GraphML exports, or use GeoJSON for dashboard-consumable output

recommendations: Sprint 0: resolve sknw/numba build (Homebrew LLVM, or evaluate skimage.morphology.medial_axis + custom tracing)
Proceed with architecture as documented — no fundamental architectural blockers found
Pin numpy<2.0 in production to avoid torch compatibility warnings
Start Sprint 0 repository initialization: src/, tests/, configs/ structure per ARCHITECTURE.md
